mentions.note: Down 15% YTD; analyst cut price target ahead of next Tuesday earnings—jarring signal; discretionary retailer in uncertain consumer environment.
Turnaround working: TikTok Shop launch, 46.7M loyalty members, wellness expansion, multi-tier store model. SGNA discipline returning in 2026; CEO Steelman executing multi-year growth strategy.
Strong same-store sales, turnaround evident on-ground; CEO driving growth, wellness expansion, TikTok integration—bright spot in retail.
Cosmetics retailer reports tomorrow night; Cramer likes it but hesitates to put 'gun to head' on entry timing; buy some here, more after quarter.
Bargain retailer earnings Thursday; real bargains in offering; will go higher unless crude hits $120; beneficiary of oil containment.
Preferred beauty play over Audacity; higher quality cosmetics retailer with better fundamentals.

Strong hold for existing positions (up 27% in 2.5 months); new buyers should wait for pullback. CEO Kisha Steelman executing three-pronged strategy: strengthen US, expand internationally, streamline costs. Q3 beat: sales +12.9%, same-store +6.3%, EPS $5.14 vs. $4.61 expected, guidance raised significantly.
